name: Royal Catering Group Holdings Company Limited
summary: Royal Catering Group Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides casual dining food catering services in Hong Kong. The company operates one restaurant under the Chinese Kitchen at the Hong Kong International Airport; and five restaurants under the Du Hsiao Yueh Restaurant, Hanlin Tea Room/Hut, Flamingo Bloom, and Da Shia Taiwan brands in the urban area of Hong Kong. It is also involved in the sale of beverages and light refreshments; property investment business; provision of human resources management services; and holding of trademarks and franchises. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Royal Catering Group Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of Fortune Round Limited.
